creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello This does not sound like a bug but something system specific (also 
you did not provide any usefull details at all, like the exact error, a 
copy/paste of that, your environment, what you were doing , your system 
etc.), please ask around on the FreeBSD questions mailinglist first 
(http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-questions/). Thanks 
for using FreeBSD!
